channel.title: Database (Porm) on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in Database (Porm) on Pionia

item.title: Configuration - Getting Started
item.description: settings.ini, connections, table aliases, and Piql.

item.title: Making Queries
item.description: get, all, save, update, delete, random, chunk, and raw SQL.

item.title: Queries with Filtering
item.description: Builder mode after filter() for complex reads.

item.title: WHERE DSL Reference
item.description: Operators, AND/OR, LIKE, IN, BETWEEN, MATCH, and nested clauses.

item.title: Relationships & Joins
item.description: inner/left/right/full joins, JoinOn helpers, filtering, count, pagination.

item.title: Pagination
item.description: limit, offset, total count, and GenericService integration.

item.title: Connections
item.description: settings.ini sections, connect vs open, RoadRunner workers.

item.title: Transactions & Raw SQL
item.description: Atomic writes and escaping the fluent builder.

item.title: Performance
item.description: Patterns for large tables and efficient reads.
